query:
SELECT EXISTS(
            SELECT 1
            FROM event_participants ep
            JOIN events e ON e.id = ep.event_id
            WHERE ep.team_id = $1
              AND e.state NOT IN ('ended','archived')
              AND e.team_size_limit IS NOT NULL
              AND $2::bigint + $3::bigint > e.team_size_limit
        ) AS "exists!"
